item.title: LFOT METAR/TAF
item.description:
🟢 METAR LFOT 301830Z AUTO 19006KT CAVOK 19/11 Q1018 TEMPO FEW060TCU
🟡 TAF LFOT 301700Z 3018/0118 20005KT CAVOK PROB40 TEMPO 3018/3022 -SHRA FEW060TCU PROB30 TEMPO 0104/0107 3000 BR BKN004 TEMPO 0111/0118 -SHRA BKN040TCU PROB30 TEMPO 0114/0118 4000 SHRA SCT050CB
